value: fetch_flow.py now includes intraday interpolation for dark pool data during market hours. When trading_day_progress < 1.0, it calculates: (1) projected full-day volume by dividing actual by progress, (2) blended buy ratio using actual_weight=progress and prior_weight=1-progress, (3) recalculated aggregate using interpolated today + actual prior days. Output includes both aggregate_actual and aggregate_interpolated, plus intraday_interpolation object with confidence level (VERY_LOW/LOW/MEDIUM/HIGH based on progress) and volume_pace (actual vs expected volume at this point). Edge assessment should use interpolated values but flag confidence. Above-average volume pace (>1.1x) means the signal is more reliable despite partial data.
